series_metadata.series_description: Audit reports of information accessed by our agency employees through the Ohio Law Enforcement Gateway (OHLEG).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Signed documents/backgrounds for Board employees who access LEADS/OHLEG maintain for the duration of employment. Newsletters/TAC in-service retain 4 years from date of issuance/completion. Agency Agreement/Administrator Training maintain until change in administrator or major changes to training., Paper: Shred
